MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-10-2022; APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE THROUGH COURTCALL FOR DEFENDANT. CANTONESE INTERPRETER, WINNIE CHAN, PRESENT IN COURT. TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON OCT-19-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 TO ALLOW TIME FOR PARTIES TO PARTICIPATE IN A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. NOTICE OF TRIAL WAIVED. THE COURT ORDER ALL PARTIES TO A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE FENG ON 10/11/22 AT 2:00PM IN DEPT. 206. ADDITIONAL MSC DAYS ARE SET ON 10/13/22 AND 10/14/22 AT 2:00PM, IF NEEDED. ALL PARTIES AS WELL AS PARTIES WITH AUTHORITY TO SETTLE ARE ORDERED TO ATTEND THE MSC IN PERSON AND A CANTONESE INTERPRETER WILL BE PROVIDED BY THE COURT, IF AVAILABLE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
